Name: Ricinoleic acid
Notes: also bears OH - note for urethane/estolide work

Name: Abietic acid (rosin acid)
Notes: rosin; verify eq wt vs CoA AV

Name: Coconut fatty acid
Notes: UVCB - MW from CoA AV (~260-268 typical AV)

Name: Maleic acid
Notes: use Maleic ANHYDRIDE entry if charging anhydride

Name: Phthalic acid
Notes: use PA anhydride entry if charging anhydride

Name: Trimer acid (C54)
Notes: UVCB - verify f and eq wt vs CoA

Name: Trimellitic anhydride
Notes: 3 acid eq; 1 anhydride ring (model credits 1 water-free correctly)

Name: Castor oil
Notes: f ~2.7 OH; verify vs CoA OHV (~160-168)

Name: Caprolactone (monomer)
Notes: ring-opens onto OH; no water - treat case-by-case

Name: Diethylenetriamine (DETA)
Notes: f=2 primary NH2; basic N = 3; cyclizes to imidazoline

Name: Triethylenetetramine (TETA)
Notes: f=2 primary; basic N = 4; verify CoA - commercial TETA is a mix

Name: Tetraethylenepentamine (TEPA)
Notes: basic N = 5; commercial mix - use CoA

Name: Aminoethylethanolamine (AEEA)
Notes: 1 primary NH2 + OH; basic N = 2; hydroxy-imidazolines

Name: Piperazine
Notes: 2 secondary NH; basic N = 2; no imidazoline (no ring path)

Name: Diethanolamine (DEA)
Notes: secondary NH + 2 OH; DEA-amides; basic N = 1

Name: Triethanolamine (TEA)
Notes: 3 OH, tertiary N (basic, non-reactive to acid) - esterifies as triol

Name: Dimethylaminopropylamine (DMAPA)
Notes: 1 primary; tertiary N; amidoamines/betaine precursors; basic N = 2

Name: MDI (4,4'-)
Notes: NCO f=2; %NCO 33.6. Use isocyanate group + urethane reaction (addition, no water) for %NCO + NCO:OH index.

Name: Polymeric MDI
Notes: NCO; f and eq wt from CoA (%NCO ~31). isocyanate group + urethane reaction (addition, no water).

Name: TDI 80/20
Notes: NCO f=2; %NCO ~48. isocyanate group + urethane reaction (addition, no water).

Name: HDI (monomer)
Notes: NCO f=2; %NCO 50.0. isocyanate group + urethane reaction (addition, no water).

Name: HDI isocyanurate trimer
Notes: NCO; nominal MW - use CoA %NCO (~21.8). isocyanate group + urethane reaction (addition, no water).

Name: IPDI
Notes: NCO f=2; %NCO 37.8. isocyanate group + urethane reaction (addition, no water).

Name: H12MDI
Notes: NCO f=2; %NCO 32.0. isocyanate group + urethane reaction (addition, no water).

Name: Styrene
Notes: UPR reactive diluent; vinyl monomer - radical cure not modeled; inert for charge math

Name: Vinyl toluene
Notes: vinyl monomer - radical cure not modeled; inert for charge math

Notes: vinyl monomer - radical cure not modeled; inert for charge math

Name: Butyl acrylate
Notes: vinyl monomer - radical cure not modeled; inert for charge math

Notes: vinyl monomer - radical cure not modeled; inert for charge math

Notes: UV diluent; vinyl monomer - radical cure not modeled; inert for charge math

Name: TMPTA
Notes: UV crosslinker; vinyl monomer - radical cure not modeled; inert for charge math

Name: Isopropanol
Notes: mono-ol; mark hydroxyl f=1 if intentionally esterifying

Name: Pyromellitic dianhydride (PMDA)
Notes: 2 rings (4 acid eq); model credits 1 water-free opening/molecule - under-credits 1 H2O for dianhydrides

Name: Polyester polyol (generic)
Notes: UVCB - leave MW blank; enter eq wt = 56100/OHV from CoA

Name: Acrylic polyol (generic)
Notes: UVCB solution - use CoA OHV on solids; f nominal

Name: Pentaethylenehexamine (PEHA)
Notes: basic N = 6; commercial mix - use CoA

Name: Jeffamine D-230
Notes: polyetheramine; MW nominal - use CoA AHEW

Name: Jeffamine T-403
Notes: trifunctional polyetheramine; MW nominal - use CoA

Name: HDI biuret
Notes: Desmodur N75/N100 type; nominal MW - use CoA %NCO (~22-23). Urethane reaction (addition, no water).

Name: IPDI isocyanurate trimer
Notes: nominal - use CoA %NCO (~17). Urethane reaction (addition, no water).

Name: MDI prepolymer (generic)
Notes: UVCB prepolymer - leave MW blank; eq wt = 4202/%NCO from CoA. Urethane reaction (addition, no water).

Notes: monofunctional acrylate; radical cure not modeled; inert for charge math

Name: DPGDA
Notes: difunctional acrylate diluent; radical cure not modeled

Notes: tri/tetra-functional commercial mix; radical cure not modeled

Name: TMPTMA

Name: EGDMA

Name: Epoxy acrylate (bisphenol A)

Name: Urethane acrylate (aliphatic)
Notes: UVCB oligomer - leave MW blank; C=C/f per CoA; radical cure not modeled

Name: Polyester acrylate
Notes: UVCB oligomer - leave MW blank; C=C per CoA; radical cure not modeled

Name: Unsaturated polyester base resin
Notes: UVCB - leave MW blank; maleate C=C is in backbone; characterize by CoA

Name: MEKP
Notes: UPR initiator; ~9% active oxygen in solution - REFERENCE only, not consumed by calc

Name: Cobalt octoate
Notes: UPR accelerator; %Co metal varies (6-12%) - REFERENCE only
